original_image_tags: A clipping from the Washington Post, dated July 8, 1947, pasted onto the document. It is yellowed and has some blue pen markings over it.

elements.description: A newspaper clipping featuring a headline and typed text. Headline: 'While Science Sneers / Air Forces Intelligence Joins Search for Flying Saucers'. Below the text columns, there is a caption: 'JUL 8 1947 / WASHINGTON POST / Page 1'.

judge.reason: Description B adds specific visual text (headline and caption) not mentioned in Description A, creating a potential hallucination where one side quotes text the other does not see.
